name: avg_per_group
mojo_driver:
def main() raises:
    var keys: List[String] = ["a", "b", "a", "c", "b", "a"]
    var vals: List[Int] = [10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60]
    print(avg_per_group(keys, vals, "a"))
    print(avg_per_group(keys, vals, "b"))
    print(avg_per_group(keys, vals, "c"))
    print(avg_per_group(keys, vals, "z"))

name: nested_pair_count
mojo_driver:
def main() raises:
    var outer: List[String] = ["fruit", "veg", "fruit", "fruit", "veg"]
    var inner: List[String] = ["apple", "carrot", "apple", "pear", "carrot"]
    print(nested_pair_count(outer, inner, "fruit", "apple"))
    print(nested_pair_count(outer, inner, "fruit", "pear"))
    print(nested_pair_count(outer, inner, "veg", "carrot"))
    print(nested_pair_count(outer, inner, "veg", "apple"))
